title: campestigma purpureum
intro: Campestigma purpureum, also known as purple campestigma, is a species of flowering plant in the family Acanthaceae, commonly found in Southeast Asia. This plant has been traditionally used in medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Campestigma purpureum include its potential to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues. The herbal preparations of Campestigma purpureum typically involve infusions of the plant's leaves or roots, which can be consumed as teas or used in topical applications.
